sections.paragraph:
Original: נכרי

Transliteration: nokrı̂y

Phonetic: nok-ree'

BDB Definition:

  1. foreign, alien
    1. foreign
    2. foreigner (substantive)
    3. foreign woman, harlot
    4. unknown, unfamiliar (figuratively)

Origin: from H5235 (second form)

TWOT entry: 1368c

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
